taxonomy:

Psilonema dasycarpum is a species of lichenized fungus and is classified as a type of lichen. Specifically, it belongs to the division Ascomycota, class Dothideomycetes, order Peltigerales, family Pannariaceae, and genus Psilonema. Within the genus Psilonema, it is one of several species that are known to form lichens with green algal photobionts. The classification of Psilonema dasycarpum reflects its unique characteristics and relationship with its green algal partner.
